title: Resize column if the column editing is restricted
excerpt:

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have restricted our columns so people can only edit columns that they are responsible for,As the tasks moving down a board can be multiple responsible people they are then unable to resize the column

You are able to sort and filter regardless of permissions setting so we assumed that resizing column with be a view function not a edit function
